claims.evidence_text: Winter wheat, cultivar Venecja (Hodowla Roślin Strzelce Sp. z o.o. Grupa IHAR, Strzelce, Poland), was sown at a rate of 270 kg ha–1 in the third decade of September
claims.claim_summary: Winter wheat (cv. Venecja) sown at 270 kg/ha in late September in Lublin, Poland

claims.evidence_text: was sown at a rate of 270 kg ha–1 in the third decade of September (2022/2023 and 2023/2024 growing seasons)
claims.claim_summary: Winter wheat sown in the third decade of September in Lublin, Poland

claims.evidence_text: The highest thousand-grain weight in both growing seasons was recorded for the treatment sprayed with a 20% mixture of plant extracts (M) (2022/2023 – 40.45 g; 2023/2024 – 44.13 g).
claims.claim_summary: Winter wheat (cv. Venecja) thousand-grain weight ranged 39.32-40.45 g across treatments in 2022/2023 season

claims.evidence_text: Absolute control 9.64 ±0.95c 9.89 ±1.12c 39.83 ±0.59ab 42.44 ±0.98bc Spraying with fungicide 9.75 ±1.02bc 10.24 ±0.72bc 39.32 ±0.47b 43.98 ±0.60ab Spraying with hemp flower extract 10.32 ±0.88a 10.92 ±0.97a 40.16 ±0.51ab 41.16 ±0.53c Spraying with a mixture of plant extracts 10.16 ±0.84ab 10.40 ±0.88ab 40.45 ±0.36a 44.13 ±1.19a
claims.claim_summary: Winter wheat (cv. Venecja) thousand-grain weight ranged 41.16-44.13 g across treatments in 2023/2024 season
